description: WCL vs LBL listing model comparison across ALL 15 circuit families at canonical sizes: Wire-Consecutive Listing (WCL, structured reorder) vs Layer-By-Layer (LBL, as-listed), under GreedyGateCancellation. Tests whether WCL changes the Phase-1 ceiling on structured families.
